text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The time spent in my shining<n>presence has given
rise to your<n>knightly skill. Be grateful!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, we must return home at once to<n>prepare a
stage! These little ones<n>have waited long enough!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I know! I'll prepare the best seat<n>in the house
for you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, you'll be put in the center of the<n>front row! As
a reward for that<n>brilliant rescue, you may bask in
my<n>radiance to your heart's content!
